changeSet.author: alexander.stanik@htw-berlin.de
changeSet.comment: Create order attachments table for storing file references from MinIO, attachable to quotation requests, quotations, or order placements
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS REMSFAL.order_attachments ( process_phase TEXT, process_id UUID, attachment_id UUID, file_name TEXT, content_type TEXT, object_name TEXT, uploader_id UUID, uploaded_by TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP, modified_at TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY ((process_phase, process_id), attachment_id) ) WITH CLUSTERING ORDER BY (attachment_id DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS order_attachments_attachment_id_idx ON REMSFAL.order_attachments (attachment_id);
